title: App for exporting and inporting data

posts.author: Daniel-At-Con (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m building an ETL from the data we have on the boards.
I would love a recommandation for an API or SASS that connects monday to preferably, Microsoft visual Studio SSIS, or Microsoft SQL server, and updates the monday boards based on the Database

Thank you for the help.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Daniel-At-Con and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I would not know of a third party platform or API to recommend but let’s hope another community user will have experience with this and give you some recommendation!

Cheers,
Matias
